name: Bruce Aidell's Bourbon-Mustard Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 1/4 cup brown sugar with 2 tablespoons low-sulfur molasses.
2. Add 1/4 cup bourbon to the mixture and stir until the sugar has dissolved.
3. Stir in 1/4 cup soya sauce and 2 teaspoons Worcestershire sauce.
4. Mix in 1/4 cup Dijon or creole mustard and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper until smooth.
5. Use this glaze to marinate pork or beef ribs before grilling or broiling.
6. Alternatively, paint the glaze on lamb, pork chops, duck breast, or ham before baking.
7. Baste with the mixture several times during cooking.
